title: Test Component Lifecycle in a Data Structures Context
description: A flowchart depicting the process of creating, running, and evaluating a test component for a data structure, highlighting the key stages and decision points.
elements: Test Case Design (Input Data & Expected Output)
Test Result Evaluator (Compare Actual vs. Expected)
relationships: Design test cases -> Feed into Test Driver
Test Driver -> Executes operations on Data Structure
Actual Output & Expected Output -> Compared by Evaluator
Evaluator -> Leads to Pass or Fail outcome
Fail outcome -> Feeds back to Debug & Refine process
